conditions.leftValue: ={{ (() => { const v = $json.value || $json.message.content; return Array.isArray(v) ? v[v.length - 1] : v; })() }}

assignments.name: message.content
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const v = $json.message.content; return typeof v === 'string' ? v.split('\n').join(',') : (Array.isArray(v) ? v.join(',') : v); })() }}
